steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "0074"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('0', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('0', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('7', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('4', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should see the employee "Paige" in the employee list
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the "Gel removal" service
When I add the "Gel removal" service to my cart
Then I should see my cart showing 1 item added
When I add the "Cut cuticle" service to my cart
Then I should see my cart showing 2 item added
When I click on the adding "Tip" button
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Add Tip"
When I fill "5" from the numpad
Then I should see "$5.00" tip in my cart
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
And I should see the card price amount "$56.50" visible
And I should see the cash price amount "$55.00" visible
When I select the "Credit" payment type
And I fill the last 4 digits of card number "1234"
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
When I click to show earning today
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Paige Earnings Today"
And I should see the text "COMMISSION $29.40" on the dialog
And I should see the text "TOTAL SALES $50.00" on the dialog
And I should see the text "TOTAL NON-CASH TIPS $5.00" on the dialog
And I should see the text "NET TOTAL SALES $49.00" on the dialog
When I click on the action button "OK" of the opening dialog
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'OK', exact: true })
When I navigate to "Tickets" on the navigation bar
And I wait for the page fully loaded
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the first ticket of payment "$56.50"
When I reopen to void ticket with payment amount "$56.50"

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$56.50' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Expect "toContainText" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$56.50' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Click locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$56.50' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'VOID TICKET', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'VOID TICKET', exact: true })

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'SELECT VOID REASON' }) }).or(locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'VOID TICKET' }) }))
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'SELECT VOID REASON' }) }).getByText('System Test', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#draggable-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: /confirm void/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /confirm/i })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#draggable-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: /confirm void/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /confirm/i })
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
When I delete ticket after void it with payment amount "55.00"
